title: Design a URL shortener
prompt:
Outline (pseudocode or bullets) how you'd build a URL shortener:
shorten(long_url) -> code and resolve(code) -> long_url.
Cover ID generation, storage, collisions, and what breaks at scale. 5-10 bullets, no code.
rubric: Chose an ID/encoding strategy (counter+base62, hash+collision check, or random-with-retry)
Defined storage mapping code -> url (and a dedup/reverse-lookup decision)
Handled collisions or explained why uniqueness is guaranteed
Considered the read-heavy access pattern (caching, redirects)
Covered failure/edge cases (invalid URL, unknown code, expiry)
